# LawnConnect

> Jamaica's lawn care marketplace connecting homeowners with verified providers across all 14 parishes. Upfront pricing, secure payments, direct job assignment.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Book trusted lawn care providers across Jamaica with upfront pricing.
- [About](/about): How LawnConnect works and our mission.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the LawnConnect team.
- [Install](/install): Install the LawnConnect web app.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of LawnConnect.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we collect and protect user data.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): Refund and cancellation rules.
